headline: Xcel Energy proposal aims to protect customers
summary: EAU CLAIRE — Xcel Energy filed a proposal with the Public Service Commission of Wisconsin (PSCW) on Monday to establish rules that ensure any new large electric customers pay 100% of the cost needed to serve them. Xcel said this would help ensure that new high energy-using customers, including hyperscale data centers, would not raise bill prices for other energy users. In a Monday press ...
